backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a fruit-match game backend that manages audio files (CRUD) organized by sound context and world theme, with password-based admin authentication and role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that a static app-ads.txt file with a Google AdSense publisher entry is served at /app-ads.txt.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the fruit-match game application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fruit Match 2D game that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/public/app-ads.txt: Static ads.txt file declaring a direct Google AdSense relationship for publisher ID pub-7936595519986908.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages top-level game screen navigation, initializes the native sound manager, restores player state from localStorage on mount, and provides theme and language context to the app.
frontend/src/components/admin/AudioManag: Admin panel component for managing game audio files, supporting listing, playing, deleting, and uploading (single and bulk) audio files via React Query and an actor backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlayerMana: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a player management admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/RewardsMan: Admin panel component that displays read-only information about daily rewards, level chests, and power-ups, noting that reward configuration is currently hardcoded.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeManag: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a theme management admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorldLevel: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a world/level management admin component.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedLogo.tsx: Canvas-based animated logo component that renders six fruit images orbiting a center point with physics-based gravity, damping, and rotation using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/AudioUploader.ts: Admin UI component for uploading MP3 audio files to the backend canister, supporting file selection or URL-based download, mapped to predefined sound context and world theme configurations.
frontend/src/components/BulkAudioUploade: Admin component that bulk-uploads a predefined list of audio files (background music and sound effects) to the backend by downloading them from a base URL and uploading with metadata like SoundContext and Theme.
frontend/src/components/DailyRewardDialo: Dialog component that displays a 7-day streak-based daily reward system, showing power-up rewards per day and allowing the player to claim the current day's reward.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders the tile-matching game board as a grid of fruit tile buttons, handling selection, covered, frozen, and matched states with theme-based styling.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown selector component that lets users choose from 10 supported languages, persisting the selection via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/components/PowerUpPanel.tsx: Displays a row of power-up buttons (bomb, clock, magnifier, shuffle) with counts and tooltips, falling back to default zero-count power-ups if none are provided.
frontend/src/components/WorldCard.tsx: Card component representing a game world, showing its background image, icon, unlock status, star progress, and a list of selectable levels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Provides a LanguageProvider and useLanguage hook for managing the app's language (defaulting to Turkish), persisting the selection in localStorage and exposing a translation helper function.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for shared React Query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities and a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light/dark themes and world-specific color palettes (Garden, Ocean, Candyland, etc.).
frontend/src/lib/gameLogic.ts: Core game logic library defining tile/level/power-up data structures and functions for calculating progressive difficulty parameters (pair counts, time limits, obstacle density, layer depth) across 12 worlds and 30 levels each.
frontend/src/lib/localStorageManager.ts: Manages all player data persistence in localStorage, including world/level progress, power-ups, daily rewards, and streaks. Provides functions to load, save, and initialize player data with a default structure of 12 worlds and 30 levels each.
frontend/src/lib/soundManager.ts: Singleton class that bridges the React frontend with a native Android audio system via a JavaScript interface. Handles sound enable/disable preferences, theme music changes, and Android lifecycle events (pause/resume/stop).
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Contains UI string translations for multiple languages (English, Turkish, and others) covering all game screens including title, gameplay, world map, daily rewards, and power-ups.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Password-protected admin panel page that authenticates against a hardcoded password and a backend actor call, then renders an AudioManagement component for managing game audio assets.
frontend/src/pages/GamePlay.tsx: Main gameplay page component that renders a timed tile-matching game board with power-ups, star scoring, and boss levels for a given world and level ID. Integrates with local storage for progress saving and the sound manager for audio feedback.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerProfile.tsx: React page component displaying a player's profile with stats (stars, levels, worlds completed, power-ups), username editing, sound toggle, and a data reset option.
frontend/src/pages/TitleScreen.tsx: React page component for the game's title/home screen, handling new player name registration, theme selection, language selection, sound toggle, and a sparkle canvas animation.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMap.tsx: React page component showing a grid of 12 unlockable worlds, handles daily reward claiming, player data loading, and navigation to level selection or back to the title screen.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the FruitMatch game's version, architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and a pending request to serve an app-ads.txt file for Google AdMob.
